description: User hovers over the blue hoodie advertisement in the right sidebar.
frame_description: The user is viewing Rome2Rio search results for travel from Rome to Palermo. The screen shows a list of train options on the left, a map in the center, and a sidebar of Cotton On clothing advertisements on the right. The cursor is over a blue hoodie ad.

description: A pink border appears around the blue hoodie ad, indicating a hover state.
frame_description: The blue hoodie advertisement is highlighted with a pink border as the cursor hovers over it.

description: User hovers over the beige hoodie advertisement in the right sidebar.
frame_description: The cursor has moved to the bottom left advertisement, which is a beige hoodie.

description: A pink border appears around the beige hoodie ad.
frame_description: The beige hoodie advertisement is highlighted with a pink border.

description: User hovers over the black hoodie advertisement in the right sidebar.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the middle left advertisement, a black hoodie, and remains there for several seconds.

description: A pink border appears around the black hoodie ad.
frame_description: The black hoodie advertisement is highlighted with a pink border.

description: User hovers over the blue hoodie advertisement again, repeating the cursor movement pattern.
frame_description: The cursor returns to the blue hoodie ad on the right.

description: A pink border appears around the blue hoodie ad.
frame_description: The blue hoodie ad is highlighted again.

description: User hovers over the beige hoodie advertisement.
frame_description: The cursor moves back to the beige hoodie ad.

description: A pink border appears around the beige hoodie ad.
frame_description: The beige hoodie ad is highlighted again.

description: User hovers over the black hoodie advertisement.
frame_description: The cursor moves back to the black hoodie ad.

description: A pink border appears around the black hoodie ad.
frame_description: The black hoodie ad is highlighted again.

description: User hovers over the blue hoodie advertisement, continuing the repetitive loop.
frame_description: The cursor returns to the blue hoodie ad for a third cycle.

description: User hovers over the beige hoodie advertisement.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the beige hoodie ad.

frame_description: The cursor moves to the black hoodie ad.

frame_description: The cursor returns to the blue hoodie ad for a fourth cycle.
